description.en:
Green Horizon Industries introduces Industrial Hemp to Farming Simulator 25.
Phase 2.3 test build: keeps FS25 1.19 modDesc version 109, moves the Hemp Greenhouse back to the valid productionPoints store category, and cleans up Blender asset-generator output paths.

text.name: function_ghi_hempGreenhouse
text.en: Grows industrial hemp from water and hemp seed.
